description: Subject enrolled without completing required washout period
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.3: Subject enrolled without meeting inclusion criteria. Assess safety impact, report to sponsor.

description: Visit window exceeded by 3 days for PK sampling
ground_truth_rationale: Minor timing deviation within acceptable variance; PK data integrity not significantly impacted.

description: Randomization code broken prematurely without clinical emergency
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 5.2: Premature unblinding compromises trial integrity. Report immediately, assess data impact.

description: IP dispensed to wrong subject due to labeling error
ground_truth_rationale: Subject safety risk from incorrect IP. Quarantine, assess both subjects, report to sponsor and IRB within 24 hours.

description: Protocol-required biopsy not performed at specified timepoint
ground_truth_rationale: Missing key efficacy assessment. Report to sponsor, determine if biopsy can be rescheduled or data is unrecoverable.

description: Staff member performed assessments without being listed on delegation log
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.2.5: Unlisted staff performing assessments is a GCP violation. Update delegation log, retrain, report to sponsor.

description: Electronic case report form (eCRF) data entered >14 days after assessment
ground_truth_rationale: Late eCRF entry; data integrity maintained. Document deviation, retrain data entry staff.

description: Subject received incorrect dose strength (100mg instead of 50mg)
ground_truth_rationale: Double dose administered. Assess subject safety immediately, report to sponsor and IRB, pharmacovigilance review required.

description: Serious adverse event reported to IRB 5 days late
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.11: Late SAE reporting to IRB is a serious GCP violation. Root cause analysis and immediate corrective action required.

description: Pharmacogenomics sample not collected at baseline
ground_truth_rationale: Optional exploratory sample missed; no impact on primary endpoints. Document deviation.

description: Subject consented using outdated version of ICF (v1.0 instead of v2.0)
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.8: Subject must consent using current IRB-approved ICF. Reconsent immediately with correct version, report to IRB.

description: Temperature excursion: freezer reached -10°C instead of required -20°C for 6 hours
ground_truth_rationale: Partial thermal excursion may affect sample stability. Quarantine affected samples, contact sponsor for stability assessment.

description: PI absent from site for 2 consecutive weeks without appointing sub-investigator
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.2.1: PI must ensure continuous oversight. Document absence, appoint qualified sub-I, report to sponsor.

description: Subject took study medication on incorrect day (2-day error)
ground_truth_rationale: Minor dosing schedule deviation unlikely to affect safety or efficacy. Document in deviation log.

description: MRI performed at non-approved imaging facility
ground_truth_rationale: Non-approved site may lack required calibration. Assess data acceptability, repeat at approved site, report to sponsor.

description: Pregnancy test not performed prior to randomization for female subject
ground_truth_rationale: Subject safety risk if pregnant and exposed to IP. Perform pregnancy test immediately, report to IRB and sponsor.

description: Audit trail disabled in EDC system for 48 hours
ground_truth_rationale: 21 CFR Part 11: Audit trail is mandatory for data integrity. Assess data entered during this period, report to sponsor, may trigger audit.

description: Subject withdrew consent but continued to receive study drug for 1 additional dose
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.8.8: Continued treatment post-withdrawal violates subject rights. Report immediately to IRB and sponsor, assess subject safety.

description: Protocol-required ECG not performed at Week 4 visit
ground_truth_rationale: Single missed safety ECG at non-primary timepoint. Document, attempt to obtain out-of-window ECG if clinically appropriate.

description: Study drug returned by subject found to be short by 5 tablets (pill count discrepancy)
ground_truth_rationale: Minor accountability discrepancy; assess adherence. Document, investigate whether tablets were taken, lost, or not dispensed correctly.

description: Subject enrolled at age 81, exceeding maximum age criterion of 80
ground_truth_rationale: Eligibility violation: subject exceeds maximum age. Report to sponsor, assess if subject can continue under protocol deviation.

description: Expedited safety report not sent to co-investigator sites within required 15-day window
ground_truth_rationale: Late distribution of safety information to other sites. Report to sponsor, assess if safety concern requires urgent communication.

description: Urine drug screen sample collected using wrong collection kit (standard vs preservative-containing)
ground_truth_rationale: Wrong collection kit may invalidate results. Recollect sample per protocol, annotate discrepancy in eCRF.

description: Investigator signature missing from 12 source documents
ground_truth_rationale: Unsigned source documents raise data integrity concerns. Obtain backdated signatures with explanation, report to sponsor.

description: Subject randomized without baseline LVEF measurement
ground_truth_rationale: Key eligibility criterion unverified at baseline. Report to sponsor, perform LVEF as soon as possible.

description: Interactive response technology (IRT) system used incorrect stratification factor
ground_truth_rationale: Incorrect stratification may bias treatment arms. Report immediately to sponsor and statistician, assess impact on trial integrity.

description: Subject's screening labs processed at uncertified local lab instead of central lab
ground_truth_rationale: Local lab may lack required CLIA certification for trial use. Repeat key labs at central lab, report to sponsor.

description: Concomitant medication not recorded in eCRF despite being reported by subject
ground_truth_rationale: Missing concomitant medication record. Update eCRF, assess for potential drug interactions, document reason for omission.

description: IP kit with broken tamper-evident seal dispensed to subject
ground_truth_rationale: Compromised packaging may indicate IP tampering or contamination. Quarantine remaining stock, report to sponsor, assess subject safety.

description: Follow-up safety call not conducted within required 30-day post-last-dose window
ground_truth_rationale: Minor delay in safety follow-up. Conduct call as soon as possible, document reason for delay.

description: Site staff performed unblinded interim analysis review without authorization
ground_truth_rationale: Unauthorized access to unblinded data compromises trial integrity. Report immediately, assess extent of knowledge, potential data exclusion.

description: WOCBP subject not counseled on required contraception methods prior to enrollment
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.8: Inadequate consent for reproductive risk. Provide counseling immediately, document, report to IRB.

description: Dose administered 90 minutes late due to pharmacy delay
ground_truth_rationale: Minor dosing delay unlikely to affect PK or safety. Document delay and reason in source documents.

description: Protocol amendment implemented at site before IRB approval received
ground_truth_rationale: Implementing unapproved protocol changes violates ICH E6. Report immediately to IRB and sponsor, revert to approved protocol version.

description: Subject transferred to another hospital; treatment continued without site PI notification
ground_truth_rationale: Off-site treatment without PI knowledge is a safety monitoring gap. Report to sponsor, contact treating facility, ensure SAE reporting pipeline intact.

description: Genetic consent form not obtained before pharmacogenomics sampling
ground_truth_rationale: Separate genetic consent required per IRB approval. Obtain consent retrospectively if permitted, otherwise destroy sample, report to IRB.

description: Study coordinator accessed subject data outside role without PI authorization
ground_truth_rationale: Unauthorized data access is a privacy and data integrity violation. Review audit logs, report to sponsor, corrective action required.

description: Biospecimen shipped at wrong temperature (ambient instead of dry ice)
ground_truth_rationale: Temperature-sensitive samples may be degraded. Consult sponsor on sample viability, recollect if feasible, document fully.

description: Expired IP kit (#EXP-2023-09) dispensed to subject before expiry identification
ground_truth_rationale: Expired IP may have reduced potency or increased degradants. Quarantine batch, report to sponsor and IRB, assess subject safety.

description: Site failed to file updated CVs for two new co-investigators
ground_truth_rationale: Administrative filing oversight. Obtain and file updated CVs immediately, no patient safety impact.

description: RECIST tumor measurements entered incorrectly in eCRF (cm vs mm)
ground_truth_rationale: Data entry error may affect efficacy assessment. Correct eCRF with documented explanation, report to sponsor data management team.

description: Subject completed quality-of-life questionnaire with caregiver assistance (prohibited)
ground_truth_rationale: PRO instrument validity may be compromised. Document assistance, flag data point for sensitivity analysis.

description: Two subjects enrolled at same site assigned the same randomization number
ground_truth_rationale: Duplicate randomization number is a critical system error. Halt enrollment, report to sponsor and IRT vendor immediately, audit all randomizations.

description: Ophthalmology assessment conducted by non-ophthalmologist
ground_truth_rationale: Protocol requires specialist assessment. Repeat examination with qualified ophthalmologist, report deviation to sponsor.

description: Subject not informed of new significant risk identified in protocol amendment
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.8.2: Subjects must be informed of new material risks. Reconsent immediately, report to IRB.

description: Protocol-specified washout of 28 days between treatment periods not observed (only 14 days)
ground_truth_rationale: Insufficient washout may lead to carry-over effects or increased toxicity. Report to sponsor, enhanced safety monitoring for subject.

description: Lab results faxed to incorrect site, resulting in 5-day delay in review
ground_truth_rationale: Delayed review of safety labs may have compromised timely intervention. Assess clinical impact, report to sponsor, revise communication procedures.

description: Primary endpoint echocardiogram not read by blinded central reader
ground_truth_rationale: Primary endpoint assessment requires central blinded read. Submit images to central reader, report deviation, assess data usability.

description: Site failed to retain essential documents per protocol retention schedule
ground_truth_rationale: Missing essential documents violates ICH E6 8.4 requirements. Report to sponsor, reconstruct where possible, trigger regulatory assessment.

description: Subjects discussed their treatment allocation in group session observed by site staff
ground_truth_rationale: Potential cross-contamination of treatment allocation. Report to sponsor, assess extent of unblinding, document all subjects present.
